arts.ttl: Barcelona have ‘reached an agreement’ with no.1 January transfer target
arts.sum: The transfer team at La Liga giants Barcelona have struck an agreement over the terms of a contract with Manchester United star Marcus Rashford. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Flick explains why Szczesny is one of the ‘best signings’ Barça have made
arts.sum: Szczesny has certainly more than delivered on and off the pitch, and it’s very impressive how he was able to come out of retirement, wait months for a chance to play, and look like he never missed a beat as soon as he made his first start. Flick went as far as to call him one of the best signings the club has made in recent years, praising Szczesny’s leadership as he helps a young squad navigate the ups and downs of a long season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Flick admits Benfica star ‘is one of my favourite players’

arts.ttl: Where to Watch FC Barcelona vs Benfica For UEFA Champions League Game
arts.sum: Barcelona are back in action in the Champions League on Tuesday, traveling to Portugal to take on Benfica.

arts.ttl: Team News: Benfica vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Benfica and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid star declared fit to face Barcelona in Champions League

arts.ttl: ‘You don’t need VAR for that’ - Flick says Barça were denied ‘clear penalty’ against Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona’s perfect start to 2025 ended at the weekend thanks to a 1-1 draw away to Getafe that ended with huge controversy thanks to a penalty on Jules Kounde that wasn’t given by the referee or the pitch or by VAR despite plenty of evidence that the Blaugrana should have been given a late spot kick. One of the very few leagues around the world where the refereeing is actually really good is the Bundesliga, so it’s only natural that Flick can’t quite believe just bad the state of officiating is in Spain.
